title: Will Pinnacle West (PNW) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
text: Pinnacle West (PNW) has an impressive earnings surprise history and currently possesses the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely beat in its next quarterly report.

title: 4 Upcoming Dividend Increases
text: All stocks have at least five fiscal years of dividend growth history and come from the U.S. Dividend Champions List. They have an average increase of 4.7% and a median increase of 2.6%.

title: Pinnacle West Is Decent And A 'Buy'- But I'd Rather Own Enel
text: It's time for a review of Pinnacle West following the loss in the rate case, some recovery, followed by yet more drawdowns. To say that Pinnacle West is a bad investment is absolutely false - it has a double-digit conservative upside at this point.

title: Pinnacle West Sets Date for 2022 Third-quarter Financial Results, Webcast/Conference Call
text: PHOENIX--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pinnacle West Capital Corp. to release 2022 third-quarter financial results on Thursday, Nov. 3, 2022.
